messages.subject: [R-SIG-Win] Rtools44 update
messages.body_plain:
Dear R Windows developers,

an update of Rtools44, the toolchain for R for Windows used by R-devel 
and R 4.4, is available as revision 6414 from

https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/rtools44/rtools.html

A number of libraries have been updated to newer versions. Package flint 
has been added. Ffmpeg build now supports libmp3lame.

See

https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/rtools44/news.html

for more details.

Best
Tomas

messages.subject: [R-SIG-Win] Rtools44 and Rtools43 update
messages.body_plain:
Dear R Windows developers,

Rtools44 and Rtools43 have been updated to fix a security vulnerability 
CVE-2025-1094 in PostgreSQL.

See the corresponding news files for more information:

https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/rtools43/rtools.html (5976)
https://cran.r-project.org/bin/windows/Rtools/rtools44/rtools.html (6459)

Best
Tomas
